member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproductExtensions.GetOrdinal(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns ordinal corresponding to the number.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproductExtensions.CoproductRepresentation(StrongTypes.ICoproduct)
member.summary: Canonical representation of the coproduct.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproductExtensions.CoproductHashCode(StrongTypes.ICoproduct)
member.summary: Returns hash code of the specified coproduct.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproductExtensions.CoproductEquals(StrongTypes.ICoproduct,System.Object)
member.summary: Returns whether the two specified coproducts are structurally equal. Note that two nulls are considered structurally equal coproducts.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproductExtensions.CoproductToString(StrongTypes.ICoproduct)
member.summary: Returns string representation of the specified coproduct type.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.ICoproduct
member.summary: A type that represents a disjunction of types, choice from multiple different types e.g. T1 or T2 or T3.

member.name: P:StrongTypes.ICoproduct.CoproductArity
member.summary: Arity of the coproduct type. Should be non-negative.

member.name: P:StrongTypes.ICoproduct.CoproductDiscriminator
member.summary: Discriminator of the coproduct type value. Should be in interval [1, CoproductArity].

member.name: P:StrongTypes.ICoproduct.CoproductValue
member.summary: Value of the coproduct type no matter which one of the possible values it is.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.ICoproduct0
member.summary: A 0-dimensional strongly-typed coproduct.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.ICoproduct1`1
member.summary: A 1-dimensional strongly-typed coproduct.

member.name: P:StrongTypes.ICoproduct1`1.IsFirst
member.summary: Returns whether the coproduct contains the first value.

member.name: P:StrongTypes.ICoproduct1`1.First
member.summary: Returns first value of the coproduct as an option. The option contains the first value or is empty if the coproduct contains different value.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproduct1`1.Match``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Returns result of a function that matches the coproduct value. E.g. if the coproduct is the first value, returns result of the function.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproduct1`1.MatchAsync``1(System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Returns result of an async function that matches the coproduct value. E.g. if the coproduct is the first value, returns result of the function.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproduct1`1.Match(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Executes the function that matches the coproduct value. E.g. if the coproduct is the first value, executes the function. If the function that should be executed is null, does nothing.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproduct1`1.MatchAsync(System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Executes the async function that matches the coproduct value. E.g. if the coproduct is the first value, executes the function. If the function that should be executed is null, does nothing.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ICoproduct9`9.Match(System.Action{`0},System.Action{`1},System.Action{`2},System.Action{`3},System.Action{`4},System.Action{`5},System.Action{`6},System.Action{`7},System.Action{`8})

member.name: T:StrongTypes.Nothing
member.summary: The bottom uninhabited type. That is the type without any instances. Can be e.g. used to denote return type of methods that never return (always throw an exception) instead of void.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.BooleanExtensions.Implies(System.Boolean,System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Returns the result of implication. So either the boolean is false or both have to be true.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.BooleanExtensions.MapTrue``1(System.Boolean,System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,``0})
member.summary: If value is true, return result of map function as an option. Otherwise return an empty option.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.BooleanExtensions.MapTrueAsync``1(System.Boolean,System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: If value is true, return result of map function as an option wrapped in a Task. Otherwise return an empty option wrapped in a Completed Task.

member.summary: If value is true, return result of map function. Otherwise return an empty option.

member.summary: If value is true, return result of map functions as an Option wrapped in a Task. Otherwise return an empty option wrapped in a Completed Task.

member.summary: If value is true, return result of map function. Otherwise return an empty option.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.BooleanExtensions.ToTry``1(System.Boolean,System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,``0})
member.summary: If value is true, return success. Otherwise return an error.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.BooleanExtensions.ToTry``2(System.Boolean,System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,``0},System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,``1})
member.summary: If value is true, return success. Otherwise return an error.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ObjectExtensions.AsCoproduct``1(System.Object,System.Func{System.Object,StrongTypes.Coproduct1{``0}},System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,System.Exception})
member.summary: Creates a new 1-dimensional coproduct as a result of type match. The specified value will be on the first place whose type matches type of the value. If none of the types matches type of the value, returns result of the fallback function. In case when the fallback is null, throws an exception (optionally created by the otherwise function).

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ObjectExtensions.AsCoproduct``1(System.Object,``0,System.Func{System.Object,StrongTypes.Coproduct1{``0}},System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,System.Exception})
member.summary: Creates a new 1-dimensional coproduct as a result of value match against the parameters. The specified value will be on the first place whose corresponding parameter equals the value. If none of the parameters matches the value, returns result of the fallback function. In case when the fallback is null, throws an exception (optionally created by the otherwise function).

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ObjectExtensions.AsSafeCoproduct``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new 2-dimensional coproduct as a result of type match. The specified value will be on the first place whose type matches type of the value. If none of the types matches type of the value, then the value will be placed in the last place.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ObjectExtensions.AsSafeCoproduct``1(System.Object,``0)
member.summary: Creates a new 2-dimensional coproduct as a result of value match against the parameters. The specified value will be on the first place whose corresponding parameter equals the value. If none of the parameters equals the value, then the value will be placed in the last place.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ObjectExtensions.AsCoproduct``2(System.Object,System.Func{System.Object,StrongTypes.Coproduct2{``0,``1}},System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,System.Exception})
member.summary: Creates a new 2-dimensional coproduct as a result of type match. The specified value will be on the first place whose type matches type of the value. If none of the types matches type of the value, returns result of the fallback function. In case when the fallback is null, throws an exception (optionally created by the otherwise function).

member.name: M:StrongTypes.ObjectExtensions.AsCoproduct``2(System.Object,``0,``1,System.Func{System.Object,StrongTypes.Coproduct2{``0,``1}},System.Func{StrongTypes.Unit,System.Exception})

member.summary: Returns whether the specified type is a nullable type.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.Negative`1
member.summary: A numeric value guaranteed to be strictly less than T.Zero.
member.remarks: Construct via or . Internally the value is stored as an offset from -T.One so that default(Negative<T>) represents -T.One — i.e. the zero-initialized struct still satisfies the negativity invariant.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.Negative`1.TryCreate(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping , or null if is not strictly less than zero.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.Negative`1.Create(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping . Throws if is not strictly less than zero.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.NonNegative`1
member.summary: A numeric value guaranteed to be greater than or equal to T.Zero.
member.remarks: Construct via or . Unlike , default(NonNegative<T>) wraps T.Zero and therefore does satisfy the invariant, though the factories remain the intended entry point.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.NonNegative`1.TryCreate(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping , or null if is less than zero.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.NonNegative`1.Create(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping . Throws if is less than zero.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.NonPositive`1
member.summary: A numeric value guaranteed to be less than or equal to T.Zero.
member.remarks: Construct via or . Unlike , default(NonPositive<T>) wraps T.Zero and therefore does satisfy the invariant, though the factories remain the intended entry point.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.NonPositive`1.TryCreate(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping , or null if is greater than zero.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.NonPositive`1.Create(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping . Throws if is greater than zero.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.NumericStrongTypeJsonConverterFactory
member.summary: that handles all numeric strong-type wrappers (, , , ). Serializes by writing the underlying numeric value directly; deserializes by reading the number and passing it through TryCreate so invalid values are rejected at the deserialization boundary.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.Positive`1
member.summary: A numeric value guaranteed to be strictly greater than T.Zero.
member.remarks: Construct via or . Internally the value is stored as an offset from T.One so that default(Positive<T>) represents T.One — i.e. the zero-initialized struct still satisfies the positivity invariant.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.Positive`1.TryCreate(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping , or null if is not strictly greater than zero.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.Positive`1.Create(`0)
member.summary: Returns a wrapping . Throws if is not strictly greater than zero.

member.name: T:StrongTypes.SumExtensions
member.summary: Sum extensions for every numeric strong type. Kept together as a single feature slice — adding a new wrapper adds one method here rather than a new file.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.SumExtensions.Sum``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{StrongTypes.Positive{``0}})
member.summary: Sums the values of a sequence of .
member.exception: is empty (the sum is T.Zero, which is not positive).

member.name: M:StrongTypes.SumExtensions.Sum``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{StrongTypes.NonNegative{``0}})
member.summary: Sums the values of a sequence of . An empty sequence yields T.Zero, which is a valid non-negative value.

member.name: M:StrongTypes.SumExtensions.Sum``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{StrongTypes.Negative{``0}})
member.summary: Sums the values of a sequence of .
member.exception: is empty (the sum is T.Zero, which is not negative).
